cloudRequirement.display: Application Logs : Using Log4Net for application logs
Access Control List : Using Access Control List
Application Settings Configuration : Using other configuration files than Web configuration
Code Execution : Using COM Components
Data Encryption Key : Using Crypto API
Execution Environment : Using file system
Execution Environment : Using system DLLs
Inter Application Messaging : Using a middleware application
Persistent Files : Perform Directory Manipulation
Persistent Files : Perform File Manipulation
Registry Settings : Using Windows registry to store Application Settings
Sensitive Data Storage Protection : Using direct Database Access through Connection Strings
Execution Environment : Access to environment variable
Temporary Files : Using a temporary local file or directory
Security & User Authentication : Using impersonate Identity
Security & User Authentication : Using Webform Authentication
Security & User Authentication : Use of Windows Authentication
Security & User Authentication : Use of unsecured network protocols or URI libraries
Security & User Authentication : Use of unsecured network protocols (HTTP)
Security & User Authentication : Use of unsecured network protocols (FTP)
Execution Environment : Using hardcoded network IP address
Persistent Files : Using stateful session (Servlet)
Data Encryption Key : Using auto generated Machine Key
Sensitive Data Storage Protection : Avoid using unsecured database connection strings
Application Logs : Using log to file system
